events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the connection **passes**. All evidence lines up — correct A325 markings, DTI silicone squirts fully extruded at every bump (exceeding RCSC's minimum check), consistent match-mark rotation across bolts, and no thread run-out in the shear plane. Risk rated low, confidence 0.92, no corrective actions needed.
